news.t: Summit Global Investments to Ring the New York Stock Exchange Closing Bell

holdings.infoBox: SGLC is an equity ETF with a total of 130 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.67%, Apple at 6.88%, Alphabet at 5.98%, Microsoft at 5.72%, and Amazon.com at 3.52%.

overview.description: The SGI U.S. Large Cap Core ETF (SGLC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively-managed, non-transparent ETF that invests in US large-cap equities firms considered to be within the range of companies in the Russell 1000 and S&P 500 index. The fund utilizes the Blue Tractor non-transparent model. SGLC was launched on Mar 31, 2023 and is issued by Summit Global Investments.

data.title: Summit Global Investments to Ring the New York Stock Exchange Closing Bell
data.text: BOUNTIFUL, Utah , Aug. 27, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- Summit Global Investments (SGI) is celebrating the SGI U.S. Large Cap Core ETF (SGLC) hitting $90 million in assets under management. To commemorate thi...
